transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Just met with Acme Corp - they want a SOC 2 letter before signing the renewal.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it. What stage is the renewal?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Stage 3. Budget approved. Just blocked on compliance.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Initech buyer asked about integration with Salesforce. I told them we have it. They want a demo next week.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Globex CTO said our pricing is too high. She wants 30% off or they'll go with competitor.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Acme Solutions. They're undercutting us by 25%.
